**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

The 'Apple Inc.' hallucination has been completely purged. Nanjing Baolifeng Venture Capital Partnership presents a profound registry contradiction: officially tagged as a 'Large' manufacturing entity in 'Electronic Device Manufacturing', its true nature is entirely different. Extracting its actual scope and company type ('Limited Partnership') reveals it is purely a Venture Capital (VC) Investment Fund. The physical footprint perfectly corroborates this: it holds a massive registered capital of 93.82 Million RMB, yet operates with 0 insured employees out of a single room address ('Room 1380'). This is the textbook structure of a Private Equity/VC Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) used to hold financial assets or pool investor capital, not an active manufacturing plant. Furthermore, its former name ('Smart Equipment Manufacturing Partnership') indicates a historic strategic pivot from an intended industrial holding to a pure financial VC entity. It currently operates as an asset-holding financial vehicle.
